1 #include "hive_mind/ExampleMessage.h"
2 #include "ros/ros.h"
3 #include "swarmus_example_pkg/DummyUtils.h"
4 
5 class HiveMindDummyConnector {
6  public:
7  HiveMindDummyConnector();
8 
9  private:
10  ros::NodeHandle node_handle;
11  ros::Publisher pub;
12  ros::Subscriber sub;
13 
14  void hiveMindTopicCallback(const hive_mind::ExampleMessage& msg);
15 };
16 
17 HiveMindDummyConnector::HiveMindDummyConnector() {
18  pub = node_handle.advertise<hive_mind::ExampleMessage>("hiveMindConnectorDummy/exampleTopic",
19  1000);
20  sub = node_handle.subscribe("hive_mind/exampleTopic", 1000,
21  &HiveMindDummyConnector::hiveMindTopicCallback, this);
22 }
23 
24 void HiveMindDummyConnector::hiveMindTopicCallback(const hive_mind::ExampleMessage& msg) {
25  ROS_INFO("The HiveMind told me :");
26  ROS_INFO("%d", msg.number);
27  ROS_INFO("%s", msg.text.c_str());
28 
29  // do some random stuff
30  int incremented = DummyUtils::addTwoNumbers(2, msg.number);
31 
32  this->pub.publish(msg);
33 }
34 
35 int main(int argc, char** argv) {
36  ros::init(argc, argv, "swarmus_example_pkg");
37 
38  HiveMindDummyConnector connector;
39 
40  ros::spin();
41 
42  return 0;
43 }
